summary: get-the-feel initialized its formal product project structure.
agentic-base process docs and lighthouse skill suite imported as local project governance sources.
Major shared skills are available from shared-skills and generated into agent runtime skill directories.
Added sentence explanation to practice route.
Story Chain contracts were expanded to lighthouse-style depth for current product development.
product directory now holds only human-readable product contract and demand validation docs; content source authority moved to assets/content.
